title: Golden Crowns
description: A resource pack that turns Golden Helmets into Golden Crowns
body:
This is a simple resource pack that turns Golden Helmets into Golden Crowns. It updates the model, the item and the item name.

Version that's styled like Bare Bones: [Bare Bones Golden Crowns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-golden-crowns-pack)

#### Here's what it looks like when it's being worn:
![A picture of a default Minecraft skin with Netherite armor and a Golden Crown instead of a helmet.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/addfa01822e22f5c650b92a626c8062fc5495e50_0.webp "Golden Crown Resource Pack")
#### And here's what the item looks like in the inventory:
![The inventory menu with the head slot being hovered over, the words "Golden Crown" being displayed in a box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92053ee4e56c0945f90c9d0586ff44c655099295.png "Golden Crown Resource Pack")
